title: Add GET /health route handler
description: Create src/routes/health.ts with a handler that calls db.ping() with a 100ms timeout and returns 200 or 503.
acceptance_criteria: GET /health returns 200 and {"status":"ok"} when db.ping() resolves
GET /health returns 503 and {"status":"degraded"} when db.ping() rejects or times out

title: Exclude /health from auth middleware
description: Update src/app.ts to register the health route before the auth middleware so unauthenticated probes are not rejected.
acceptance_criteria: Requests to GET /health succeed without an Authorization header
Requests to all other routes still require valid auth

title: Write integration tests for health endpoint
description: Add test/routes/health.test.ts covering the happy path, degraded state, and no-auth scenarios using supertest.
acceptance_criteria: Test suite passes with npm test
